creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
I have the same machine and I ran 9-STABLE (amd64) on it. And since a month I run 10-STABLE (amd64) on it.

It only panics on boot if you press a key before the kernel is loaded. Like what is mentioned here: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2009-October/012602.html
This still happens, but does not bother me. (And sounds like another issue anyways.)

Is this issue still valid?
